name: ConvoyLands
description: Application spec. Full convoy-lands flow as pure composition. Two `Lane` instances replace the previous Iss1/Pol1/Mr1/Wt1/Hk1 + Iss2/Pol2/Mr2/Wt2/Hk2 enumeration -- 7 component instances down from 15. Each Lane bundles its own Hook + Polecat + Issue + MR + Worktree; the project wires only the lane-level boundaries (sling in, merge-ready out, refinery in, clean in) plus the cross-cutting coordinators (Mayor, Convoy, Feeder, Refinery, Landing). Project invariants observe lane internals via deep paths (Lane1.Iss, Lane1.Pol, etc.) -- backlog 146 enables the deep-bind resolution.

invariants.description: CRITICAL. At Landed, both issues Closed and both MRs Merged. Honest because MR can only reach Merged via Refinery sending the MergeMR event.
invariants.expression: Con.convoy # Con.Landed \/ (Lane1.Iss.issue = Lane1.Iss.Closed /\ Lane2.Iss.issue = Lane2.Iss.Closed /\ Lane1.Mr.mR = Lane1.Mr.Merged /\ Lane2.Mr.mR = Lane2.Mr.Merged)

invariants.description: CRITICAL. At Landed, both polecats Idle.
CRITICAL. At any landed state, both worktrees Cleaned.
invariants.expression: (Con.convoy # Con.Landed /\ Con.convoy # Con.LandedForce) \/ (Lane1.Wt.worktree = Lane1.Wt.Cleaned /\ Lane2.Wt.worktree = Lane2.Wt.Cleaned)

invariants.description: CRITICAL. LandedForce only via Mayor ForceLanding.
invariants.expression: Con.convoy # Con.LandedForce \/ May.mayor = May.ForceLanding \/ May.mayor = May.Done
